'''Root''' was the nickname of a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with black [[Hair/Legends|hair]] living on [[Somov Rit]] as of [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]]. He was the cousin and guardian of [[Darth Zannah/Legends|Zannah]], [[Darovit]], and [[Hardin]]. He was an ally of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], a friend of [[Torr Snapit]], and apparently a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]].

{{Char-stub}}
